entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: An important cereal crop grown in Asia, Africa, Americas, and Australia

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region where sorghum is grown and suffers from insect pest damage

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where sorghum is grown and suffers from insect pest damage

entities.name: AMERICAS
entities.description: A region where sorghum is grown

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: A region where sorghum is grown and suffers from insect pest damage

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, which is reduced by insect pests

entities.name: INSECT PEST DAMAGE
entities.description: The negative impact caused by various insect species on sorghum crops

entities.name: SORGHUM SHOOT FLY
entities.description: Atherigona soccata, a major pest of sorghum

entities.name: STEM BORERS
entities.description: Insects including Chilo partellus, Busseola fusca, Eldana saccharina, and Diatraea spp. that damage sorghum

entities.name: ARMYWORMS
entities.description: Insects including Mythimna separata, Spodoptera frugiperda, and S. exempta that damage sorghum

entities.name: SHOOT BUG
entities.description: Peregrinus maidis, a major pest of sorghum

entities.name: APHIDS
entities.description: Insects including Schizaphis graminum and Melanaphis sacchari that damage sorghum

entities.name: SPIDER MITES
entities.description: Oligonychus spp., a major pest of sorghum

entities.name: GRASSHOPPERS AND LOCUSTS
entities.description: Insects including Hieroglyphus, Oedaleus, Aliopus, Schistocerca, and Locusta that damage sorghum

entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: Stenodiplosis sorghicola, a major pest of sorghum

entities.name: MIRID HEAD BUGS
entities.description: Insects including Calocoris angustatus and Eurystylus oldi that damage sorghum

entities.name: HEAD CATERPILLARS
entities.description: Insects including Helicoverpa, Eublemma, Cryptoblabes, Pyroderces, and Nola that damage sorghum

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: A region experiencing significant economic losses due to insect pests in sorghum

entities.name: UNITED STATES
entities.description: A region experiencing economic losses due to insect pests in sorghum

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A region where nearly 32% of sorghum crop is lost due to insect pests

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO INSECT PESTS
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to withstand or repel attack by insect pests
